message:
test(core): add property-based tests for Bayesian hitch-risk model (ft-2p9cb.4.1.3)

10 proptests: posterior bounded, LLR direction, risk level monotonic,
evidence bounded, reset restores low, signal/level/degradation serde,
decay convergence. All 180 proptests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
